case_title: ANTONIO HERNANDEZ VS. DANILO AMABEL MORAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, DANILO AMABEL AN INDIVIDUAL DBA D A M CONSTRUCTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, ANTONIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORAN, DANILO AMABEL AN INDIVIDUAL DBA D A M CONSTRUCTION $6,847.33 PRINCIPAL, $98.34 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,125.67, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
